response:
{
  "hypothesis": "Normalized 20-day price momentum multiplied by 60-day volume growth predicts 10-day forward return.",
  "concise_knowledge": "If price momentum is normalized and combined with volume growth over a longer window, it may provide more robust predictive signals; when volume growth is scaled appropriately, it enhances the reliability of price trends.",
  "concise_observation": "Previous attempts showed that combining momentum with volume improves IC, but noise and window size affect stability and predictive power.",
  "concise_justification": "Normalizing momentum and using a longer volume window reduces noise and captures more persistent trends, leading to more stable and predictive signals.",
  "concise_specification": "Use 20-day normalized price momentum (ZSCORE) multiplied by 60-day volume growth (TS_PCTCHANGE), to predict 10-day forward return. Expected IC > 0.05 and IR > 0.6."
}
